title: IPv4 Subnetting & IP Configuration
description: Configure static IPv4 addresses, subnet masks, and default gateways on a dual-subnet local network topology to ensure peer connectivity.

title: VLAN Trunking & Switch Routing
description: Configure switch trunks, access ports, and VLAN membership (VLAN 10, VLAN 20) on Catalyst Switches, verifying frames isolation.

title: Basic Gateway Static Routing
description: Establish point-to-point static router hops between corporate and branch segment gateways. Test end-to-end packet transmission.

title: Advanced Static Route Redundancy
description: Implement backup floating static routes with high administrative distance for failover, testing link cut scenarios.
